Fairy Godmother Outfit

Once in a while, blesses 2 allies with the lowest max health. Blessed units have their max health increased by 100% of the armor wearer's spell power. If a blessed ally dies while the blessing is active, they have a 60% chance to become resurrected with 30% health.

Requirements: 98-100
